data.description: TravelingWiki has unveiled ShoheiAutographs.com as part of its range of services, showcasing a GenAI platform in beta testing. data.title: Marie O'Malley to Speak on Manufacturing Tradeoffs Panel at MPP West 2026
data.description: PiSA USA has revealed that their Chief Commercial Officer, Marie O'Malley, is set to be a key panelist at MPP West 2026. O'Malley will be part of the discussion named "Cheaper, Faster, Compliant: Pick Two," focusing on the importance of balancing cost, speed, and regulatory compliance in the contemporary medical industry. This event highlights the significance of making strategic decisions in achieving optimal results in the medical sector.

data.title: Approval Genie Wins 2026 Consumer Choice Award for Business Excellence in Auto Finance, Peel Region
data.description: Approval Genie, a prominent auto financing company in Mississauga and throughout Ontario, is thrilled to receive the 2026 Consumer Choice Award for Business Excellence in the Auto Finance sector for the Peel Region. This accolade solidifies Approval Genie's position as a top choice for customers seeking auto financing solutions. The award showcases the company's commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction, reinforcing its reputation as a trusted provider in the industry. This recognition highlights Approval Genie's dedication to offering outstanding services in auto financing.

data.title: Pavel Durov says Iran's ban on Telegram has prompted thousands of developers creating VPNs to evade state internet control.
data.description: According to reports, a significant number of software developers, reaching into the thousands, are actively working on creating virtual private networks (VPNs) to bypass government restrictions on internet access. This statement was made by Durov.

data.title: Pharming Group announces the filing of its 2025 Annual Report and Form 20-F
data.description: Pharming Group has officially submitted its 2025 Annual Report and Annual Report on Form 20-F. These documents can be accessed at annualreport.pharming.com for detailed information regarding the company's performance and financial status.

data.title: Jerome Powell Sounds Alarm On $39 Trillion 'Unsustainable' Debt Path, Says It Will 'Not End Well'
data.description: During a speech at Harvard University, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell raised concerns regarding the fiscal path of the United States. Powell highlighted the country's $39 trillion debt load as being unsustainable, emphasizing the need for prompt legislative action to avert a potential crisis. He warned that if no action is taken soon, the situation may lead to adverse consequences. Powell pointed out that despite the high debt levels, the U.S. is in a better position than smaller economies, given its status as the world's reserve currency issuer and having deep capital markets. When asked about the breaking point for U.S. debt, Powell admitted that the exact threshold remains uncertain. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Minnesota announces 2025 financial results.

data.title: IRS Data Shows Average Tax Refunds Jump 10.9% In 2026 Filing Season
data.description: During the 2026 filing season in the United States, the average tax refund has seen an increase, reaching $3,571 according to recent data from the IRS as of March 20. This marks a $350 rise, representing a 10.9% increase compared to $3,221 from the previous year. The total amount of refund payments has also gone up, with the IRS issuing over $202 billion so far, in contrast to $179 billion from the year prior. The number of refunds has slightly risen to approximately 56.7 million, reflecting a 1.8% increase. Despite higher refund amounts, there has been a minor slowdown in filing activity overall. The total returns received have decreased by 0.9% to 78.9 million, and returns processed have also declined by 1.1% to 77.8 million. More taxpayers are opting to file on their own, with self-prepared returns showing an increase of 1.9% to over 37.8 million. On the other hand, filings handled by tax professionals have dropped by 1% to 39.7 million.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Falls After Trump, Powell Comments; Micron, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla Are Key Losers
data.description: The stock market experienced a mixed finish on Monday as Dow Jones Futures recorded divergent movements following statements from President Trump and Fed Chair Powell. Oil prices saw a significant rise, while Micron faced a notable decline. Nasdaq also reported a drop after the comments made by Trump and Powell. Key market players such as Micron, Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla ended as significant losers in the trading session.

data.title: Plug Power Secures Largest Electrolyzer Projects To-Date
data.description: Shares of Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) are facing a decline in the premarket trading session. The company has secured a major contract to supply a 275 MW GenEco PEM electrolyzer system for Hy2gen Canada's "Courant" project. This deal comes amidst a general market downturn, adding pressure to the stock's performance. Plug Power has clinched a Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) contract for what is considered one of the largest electrolyzer projects to date. The initiative is geared towards aiding the production of low-carbon ammonia, making use of Canada's low-carbon hydroelectric resources. Hy2gen is spearheading the Courant project, set to be one of North America's biggest low-carbon ammonium nitrate facilities, catering to the mining industry in Québec, Central and Eastern Canada, among other regions. Plug Power is contributing advanced engineering and system design services to synergize electrolyzers, streamline plant configuration, and boost overall performance. Its PEM electrolyzer technology is renowned for its high reliability, efficiency, and operational adaptability.

data.title: Entera Bio Announces Pricing of $10.0 Million Direct Investment by BVF Partners with Potential for up to $24.5 Million in Total Proceeds
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 2, 2026, Entera Bio Ltd. (Nasdaq: ENTX), a prominent developer of oral peptides, revealed its participation in a securities purchase agreement for a private placement. The arrangement, led by funds linked to BVF Partners L.P., signifies a significant development for the company.
